reason: The 82-parent pilot builder and checker computed the available primary-block domain from inherited fourth/fifth recipe units only. They omitted negative primary unit clauses already embedded in each cached parent CNF. Its deficit triples, branch counts, and zero-child receipts therefore do not describe the exact residual domain.
scope: This invalidates only the hard-tail-deficit-partition pilot. The independently audited generic all-82 sixth partition parses cached parent-CNF negative units and is not affected.
replacement: The versioned all-open rebuild open-fifth-deficit-partition-v2 subsumes the pilot after its independent audit passes.
claim_limit: Do not use this artifact for coverage, branch counts, sampling, solving, or theorem claims.
